message:
feat(runtime): add program mode transitions with recovery tracking, enhanced shadow-run scenario specs, and TTY drain timeout

program.rs (+91 lines):
- Add RuntimeMode enum: Healthy, Stressed, Degraded, Recovered with
  associated pressure_class() and strict_guarantees_intact() queries
- Add ModeTransition event tracking: records mode_before, mode_after,
  pressure_class, recovery_latency_us, trigger reason
- Program gains mode: RuntimeMode field and mode_transitions log
- transition_mode(): validates legal transitions (Healthy→Stressed,
  Stressed→Degraded, Degraded→Recovered, Recovered→Healthy) and
  records transition with timestamp for latency computation
- is_degraded(), pressure_level(), recovery_history() accessors

proptest_ivm_invariants.rs (+40 lines):
- New proptest strategies for mode transition sequences
- Invariant: mode transitions must be monotonic within a pressure
  ramp (Healthy→Stressed→Degraded, never skip)
- Invariant: recovery transitions always produce Recovered before
  returning to Healthy

shadow_run_comparator.rs (+451 lines):
- ScenarioSpec gains mode_transitions field for scenarios that test
  runtime mode behavior under pressure
- New scenario: mode_transition_determinism — replays a fixed pressure
  schedule and asserts identical mode transition sequences
- New scenario: recovery_complete_under_load — validates that degraded
  mode recovers within bounded latency after pressure drops
- MismatchReasonCode gains ModeTransition and RecoveryLatency variants
- LaneSummary extended with mode_transition_count and
  max_recovery_latency_us fields

ftui-tty/src/lib.rs (+72 lines):
- Add drain_with_timeout() that reads remaining bytes from the TTY
  fd after the program exits, with a configurable timeout (default 50ms)
  to prevent blocking on a stuck PTY
- DrainResult struct: bytes_drained, timed_out, duration_us
- Used in cleanup to ensure all pending output is consumed before
  closing the PTY fd

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
